reasoning: The interviewer asked about the actions users should perform, and the user explicitly stated a preference for users to input and send data by submitting forms, which directly matches hidden implicit requirement IR1.

The interviewer's question about visual style preferences (light/dark theme, color palette) directly prompted the user to reveal two hidden implicit requirements: IR3 (global background color to be light coral) and IR4 (all UI pieces to be colored indian red). Both were in the remaining list and were successfully elicited by this probe.

The interviewer asked about the types of data users will submit through forms. The user's response indicated uncertainty about data types and did not reveal any hidden implicit requirements. The remaining requirement IR2 (about responsive design adapting to different screen sizes and devices) was not touched upon in either the question or the answer.
